12 Berlin districts

Berlin by district — where to stay best

Each district has its own personality. We guide you through all 12 — from Mitte with the landmarks to Treptow-Köpenick with the lakes.

Centre (Mitte)

· 1 districts
H.Helmlechner · CC BY-SA 4.0
Centre 11 hotels

Mitte

Stately, history-rich, urban-elegant. Tourists by day, theatre and fine dining by night.

Brandenburg Gate Museum Island Reichstag

West Berlin

· 2 districts
Fridolin freudenfett · CC BY-SA 3.0
West 9 hotels

Charlottenburg-Wilmersdorf

Elegant, refined, calm. Shopping on Ku'damm, coffee at Savignyplatz, classical concerts at the Philharmonie.

Kurfürstendamm Charlottenburg Palace KaDeWe
A.Savin · CC BY-SA 3.0
West

Spandau

Small-town feel, historic, waterside. Old-town charm, festivals at the citadel, Havel ferries.

Spandau Citadel Spandau Old Town Havel waterfront

East Berlin

· 4 districts
Dietmar Rabich · CC BY-SA 4.0
East 4 hotels

Friedrichshain-Kreuzberg

Alternative, creative, vibrant. Nightlife on the edge, street art on every corner, cafés open late.

East Side Gallery Mercedes-Benz Arena RAW area
UnknownUnknown · CC BY-SA 3.0 de
East 1 hotels

Treptow-Köpenick

Water, woods, recovery. Boat tours, lake lidos, boat rentals, Spreepark memories.

Müggelsee Köpenick Palace Treptower Park
Matti Blume · CC BY-SA 4.0
East

Lichtenberg

Down-to-earth, well-connected, affordable. Tierpark walks, GDR architecture, everyday Berlin.

Berlin Tierpark Stasi Museum Friedrichsfelde Palace
A.Savin · CC BY-SA 3.0
East 1 hotels

Marzahn-Hellersdorf

Urban-functional, with green oases. Plattenbau character, international gardens, wide playgrounds.

Gardens of the World Biesdorf Palace Wuhletal

North Berlin

· 2 districts
nikey · CC BY-SA 4.0
North 4 hotels

Pankow

Family-friendly, green, relaxed. Cafés with kids' corners, Sundays at Mauerpark, stuccoed period buildings.

Mauerpark Kollwitzplatz Kulturbrauerei
Flocci Nivis · CC BY 4.0
North 1 hotels

Reinickendorf

Calm, green, lakeside. Walks at Tegeler See, Tegel forest, Tegel Palace.

Tegeler See Tegel forest Tegel Palace

South Berlin

· 3 districts
Reinhold Möller Ermell · CC BY-SA 4.0
South 2 hotels

Neukölln

Hip, diverse, creative, young. Brunch spots, late-night kiosks, bargain markets, gallery openings.

Tempelhofer Feld Maybachufer Klunkerkranich
Dirk Ingo Franke · CC BY-SA 4.0
South 2 hotels

Tempelhof-Schöneberg

Urban, cosy, well-connected. Winterfeldt market, kite-flying on the field, café culture.

Tempelhofer Feld Winterfeldtplatz Rathaus Schöneberg
Nightflyer · CC BY-SA 4.0
South 2 hotels

Steglitz-Zehlendorf

Calm, green, refined. Walks in the Grunewald, Wannsee lido, Dahlem villa colony.

Grunewald forest Wannsee Krumme Lanke
